title: Noblesse
intro: Noblesse status is required to unlock the SP conversion skill needed for Rebirth. Obtain it through the **Noblesse Manager NPC in Giran** by providing a **Caradine's Letter**.

figure.caption: Vesper Noble Geade — farm here for Caradine's Letter materials

cells: Farm crafting materials in the **Vesper Noble Grade** — spoil/sweep mobs for free drops, or obtain via donation

infoBoxes.label: Free & Easy
infoBoxes.body: Spoiling mobs in the Vesper Noble Grade is the free route. A full Noblesse guide with mob locations and exact material drops will be added soon.
